## Summary

-

## Backend impact

- [ ] Auth or wallet signature flow
- [ ] Portfolio or health-factor logic
- [ ] Asset, price, or reserve configuration
- [ ] Transaction lifecycle or Soroban simulation
- [ ] Indexing or ledger event sync
- [ ] Admin configuration or RBAC
- [ ] Documentation/templates only

## Test evidence

Commands run:

```text

```

- [ ] Backend unit tests (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Backend e2e tests (`npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Lint/format checks (`npm run lint` or `npm run format`)
- [ ] Docs-only change, no runtime tests needed

## Security checklist

- [ ] No private keys, seed phrases, API tokens, `.env` files, or real wallet data are committed
- [ ] Auth/RBAC behavior is described when changed
- [ ] Financial state, health-factor, liquidation, or indexer changes include failure-mode notes
- [ ] Public API or DTO changes include compatibility notes
